1.name: MED4 cluster 1 (early transient)
1.functional_description: Enriched for high-light-inducible stress response genes including hli, carbon metabolism gene rbcLS, transcription genes rpoC2 and rpoD, and ribosomal protein genes rpl5, rpl6, rps8, rps11, and rps17.
1.temporal_pattern: Transiently upregulated immediately after infection, with expression peaking early in the infection time course.

supporting_quotes.quote: The first was transiently upregulated immediately after infection and consists of high-light-inducible stress response (hli), carbon metabolism (rbcLS), transcription (rpoC2, rpoD) and ribosome (rpl5, rpl6, rps8, rps11, rps17) genes.

2.name: MED4 cluster 2 (late sustained)
2.functional_description: Includes genes involved in RNA degradation and modification such as rne, rnhB, dus, and sun; protein turnover genes clpS and an AAA ATPase family gene; stress response genes umuD and phoH; and genes of unknown function.
2.temporal_pattern: Upregulated starting approximately 2 hours after infection and sustained through later time points.

supporting_quotes.quote: Transcripts of the second group appeared 2 h after infection and included genes involved in RNA degradation and modification (rne, rnhB, dus and sun), protein turnover (clpS, and an AAA ATPase family gene), stress responses (umuD and phoH), and those of unknown function.
